# CWE-807: Reliance on Untrusted Inputs in a Security Decision (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-807-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var blockedIPs = map[string]struct{}{"203.0.113.50": {}}

// Safe: uses RemoteAddr from the trusted connection rather than a spoofable header.
func GateSensitiveAction(c *gin.Context) {
	clientIP := c.Request.RemoteAddr
	if _, blocked := blockedIPs[clientIP]; blocked {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
